findings.hnd_exposure_estimate: Internal / not matched to an external-facing path convention
findings.suggested_replacement: Remove hardcoded classical ciphers (ECDHE-RSA) and use hybrid PQC suites if supported by the ingress controller.

findings.hnd_exposure_estimate: Internal / not matched to an external-facing path convention
findings.suggested_replacement: Use TLS 1.3 with hybrid PQC key exchange (ML-KEM/ML-DSA) where supported by the cloud provider.
